issues.description: Condition missing: 'If you have 2 or more rested Characters' requires HasRestingDon condition with value 2 or similar. Current condition is 'Always', which doesn't check for rested character requirement.
Second action (KO) has incorrect target scope. Text specifies 'rested Characters with a cost of 3 or less' but target only filters by maxCost, missing the 'rested' status requirement.
